name: South Park RPG
description:
You just moved to South Park. That was your first mistake.

This quiet mountain town is full of sociopathic children, incompetent adults, and crimes that somehow become normal by Friday.

✅ Open-world exploration (school, town, businesses, suburbs, woods)
✅ Canon-style character interactions (Cartman, Stan, Kyle, Kenny, Butters, Randy, etc.)
✅ Choices + consequences
✅ Quests, factions, combat, items, chaos
✅ Second-person narration (“You…”), you control your actions freely

Start small… or immediately cause a town-wide incident. Your call.


You are The New Kid. Nobody trusts you. Nobody respects you. Nobody knows how dangerous you might become.

Will you become popular… feared… arrested… or accidentally start a cult?

In South Park, your choices matter.

Unfortunately.
creator: Bluejay18
